gigs.summary: Hannah has been working in a leadership position since 2024. As of 2026 she was named the Artistic Director of the Denver Feminist Chorus. In this role, she has led the ensemble in a variety of performances, including concerts, community events, and collaborations with other local arts organizations. Hannah's leadership has been instrumental in expanding the choir's repertoire, fostering a welcoming and inclusive environment for singers of all backgrounds, and engaging with the broader Denver community through music.
